headline: Dell shrinks workforce by 11,000 in fiscal 2026 amid ongoing restructuring
summary: Dell Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:DELL) reduced its workforce by roughly 11,000 employees in fiscal 2026, bringing total headcount to about 97,000 as of January 31, 2026, according to its latest 10-K filing. The decline represents a 10% year-over-year reduction and marks the third consecutive...

headline: Penguin Solutions Selected by Deepgram to Enable Deployment of Optimized AI Inference Infrastructure for Enterprise Voice AI
summary: FREMONT, Calif., March 17, 2026--Penguin Solutions announced a collaboration with Deepgram and Dell for an optimized infrastructure aligned to Deepgram’s enterprise voice AI needs.

headline: Dell vs HP: 2 Legacy Tech Giants, 2 Very Different AI Bets
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) and HP (NYSE: HPQ) are two legacy tech names that retirement investors have held for decades. Right now, they are not the same bet. One is riding the AI infrastructure wave; the other is fighting margin compression in a declining print market. Here is how they compare across the dimensions that matter ... Dell vs HP: 2 Legacy Tech Giants, 2 Very Different AI Bets

headline: Dell’s New AI Platform And Desktops Target Enterprise Agent Workloads
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) has introduced a next generation AI Data Platform with extensive automation across the data lifecycle. The company launched new AI scale file systems and Nvidia powered desktop supercomputers aimed at enterprise AI workloads. Dell also added support for NVIDIA NemoClaw and OpenShell to develop secure, autonomous AI agents, including options for sensitive and classified environments. Dell is best known for PCs, servers, and storage, but this move pushes deeper...
